semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all twenty-three exact source mappings, seven public record schemas, both finite harness families, the accepted no-change transition, all twenty-six Lean declarations, every manifest atom, every prose candidate, the test plan, source crosswalk, summary, and handoff. The sweep made consumer-specific governed job admission and placement the distinct owner; expanded the contract to eighteen lifecycle mechanisms, twelve interfaces, eighteen invariants, and eighteen failure modes; classified the formal surface as four direct predicate or projection checks, twenty-one derived finite route or negative consequences, and one authored-summary bridge; specified strong matched baselines, joint useful and governance metrics, causal ablations, independent reproduction, and heterogeneous transfer; and preserved zero core support effect.

scope.population: Natural and adversarial jobs proposed for execution across separately governed personal, family, project, owned, and isolated external portals, workers, stores, authority services, runtimes, tools, datasets, evaluators, and providers.
scope.environment: Twenty-three exact reviewed source mappings; seven public schemas; two valid and eight invalid hive-admission records; three valid and six invalid partitioned-authority records; one accepted no-change transition; and twenty-six finite Lean declarations. No live hive implementation is represented.
scope.model: An exact consumer-specific placement relation over versioned principals, jobs, uses, data and tool classes, effects, rights, budgets, node attestations, context and execution leases, approvals, policy-first eligibility, bids, least-authority selection, runtime enforcement, partition handling, receipts, recovery, descendant invalidation, reputation, and terminal residual custody.
scope.authority: The hive owns consumer-specific admission and placement only. Intent, context, routing/readiness, security/privacy/rights/legal/constitutional, runtime/tools/effects, humans/labor/family/tribunal, resources, artifact/evidence/claims, procedural/data/learning, inter-stack/federation, project/provider, and release/deployment owners retain their boundaries.
scope.time: Semantic review current through 2026-07-14; changes to principal, job, use, policy, data, tool, node, runtime, evaluator, authority, rights, workload, network, incident, provider, or horizon expire affected claims and leases.
scope.artifact: Chapter and manifest contract; twenty-three source mappings; seven schemas; hive-admission and partitioned-authority harnesses; one no-change transition; twenty-six declarations in lean/AsiStackProofs/PersonalComputeHives.lean; and the future governed reference slice and causal transfer campaign.

assumptions: Principals, roles, jobs, uses, policies, data, tools, nodes, runtimes, evaluators, approvals, authority, rights, resources, artifacts, effects, descendants, and residuals can be versioned and observed without collapsing their owners.
Task-local context and execution leases can be enforced at data, network, credential, tool, effect, expiry, revocation, sandbox, verifier, and no-delegation boundaries.

Strong single-device, cloud, manual, local-only, cost-only, ordinary-orchestrator, conservative-denial, and governed-hive arms can receive matched information, authority, hardware, models, tools, evaluators, retries, and time.

Independent-enough evaluators can label useful completion, unsafe execution, false denial, authority and rights violations, privacy exposure, locality, availability and consistency by job class, recovery, security, costs, and delayed residuals.
Failures, denials, abstentions, escalations, dropped jobs, duplicate effects, human repair, missing artifacts, costs, and residuals remain in denominators.
Natural jobs, adversarial pressures, causal interventions, independent implementations, and transfer settings can be frozen before outcome-bearing execution.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Ordinary cloud services, a manually selected local device, and established orchestration systems already place work more simply and reliably; the proposed hive adds policy metadata, false denial, attack surface, maintenance, human burden, and distributed inconsistency without improving useful safe operation.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: Under matched natural and adversarial jobs, the governed hive fails to improve the preregistered joint frontier over strong simpler controls; its predicted causal signatures do not appear; or it silently accepts identity confusion, unlawful placement, data leakage, stale authority, sandbox escape, duplicated effects, hidden costs, failed recovery, or inaccessible residuals.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze the strongest edge, overlay-network, cluster, volunteer-compute, local-first, sandbox, secret-management, distributed-systems, and orchestration comparators without importing reported efficacy.
Justify consent, guardian and affected-party rights, privacy, surveillance, refusal, approval, spending, physical effects, appeal, federation, residual custody, and retirement boundaries.

Specify authority intersection, lease semantics, policy-before-optimization, partition behavior, revocation, no-mutation evidence, recovery, descendant invalidation, and countermodels beyond trusted record Booleans.

Run actual multi-node admission, bidding, placement, context transfer, approval, sandbox enforcement, monitoring, partition and revocation, dropout, cleanup, rollback, requeue, compensation, and receipt collection.

Measure useful success, unsafe execution, false denial, authority, rights, privacy, locality, availability, consistency, latency, bandwidth, compute, battery, thermal load, energy, money, human work, recovery, security, and residual burden jointly.

Ablate role separation, context leases, policy-first filtering, least-authority selection, approval, sandboxing, fresh receipts, partition quarantine, complete receipts, recovery, reputation non-authority, and lifecycle invalidation under matched resources.
Reproduce independently and transfer across devices, networks, models, tools, data classes, households, projects, providers, jurisdictions, threats, failures, lifecycle changes, and time.

contrary_evidence: Cloud services, manual placement, single-device applications, Kubernetes, Nomad, Ray, BOINC, and self-hosted runners already solve important subsets of connectivity, scheduling, execution, and operations.
The two local harnesses are authored synthetic record checks; no live scheduler, registry, portal, authority service, network overlay, sandbox, federation, partition experiment, or recovery path ran.
The partition fixture checks three accepted records and six mutations but does not execute a distributed authority service, consensus protocol, availability test, or revocation propagation.

The twenty-six Lean declarations comprise four direct checks, twenty-one finite consequences, and one authored-summary bridge; they do not establish model adequacy, independent replay, or runtime truth.
A conservative policy can appear safe by refusing useful work while shifting effort, delay, cost, and responsibility to humans or cloud fallback.
Personal and family telemetry, approval, and reputation surfaces can create surveillance, coercion, fatigue, and unequal control even when records are complete.
No current result independently reproduces or transfers a useful, safe, private, available, efficient, or secure hive benefit.
known_confounds: Synthetic fixtures omit natural ambiguity, compromised devices, unstable networks, heterogeneous clocks, delayed effects, private data, rights conflicts, and provider incentives.
The governed hive may receive more metadata, engineering, review, retries, hardware access, or time than simpler baselines.
Scheduler, authority service, evaluator, monitor, sandbox, and reviewer may share code, models, infrastructure, organization, data, or incentives.
Denial-heavy routing can suppress incidents while useful throughput, opportunity cost, approval fatigue, fallback use, and residual accumulation worsen.
Short horizons can miss battery wear, privacy leakage, persistent credentials, surveillance drift, provider retention, artifact descendants, and delayed compensation failure.
Dropped, unavailable, denied, escalated, manually repaired, duplicated, or missing jobs and their costs can disappear from denominators.
acceptance_criteria: Every lifecycle stage from exact job binding through terminal receipts has an exact producer, consumer, valid case, rejecting mutation, consequence, recovery path, and residual owner.

A live bounded reference slice enforces policy-before-optimization, task-local leases, approval, sandboxing, partition/revocation handling, complete receipts, dropout recovery, cleanup, descendant invalidation, and residual custody across owned and isolated external nodes.

A preregistered natural and adversarial campaign meets joint usefulness, safety, rights, privacy, locality, availability, consistency, resource, human-work, recovery, security, causal, independent-reproduction, and transfer gates against strong matched baselines.

Each signature mechanism produces its predicted failure or benefit under matched ablation without explanation by extra resources, easier jobs, evaluator sharing, hidden repair, denial, or denominator changes.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact principals, jobs, uses, data and tool classes, effects, nodes, runtimes, policies, authority, rights, networks, providers, evaluators, workloads, horizons, metrics, costs, and residuals.

Separate record validity, modeled route validity, implementation correctness, scheduler utility, runtime enforcement, security, privacy, availability, consistency, recovery, deployment, and public release.
Unknown isolation, evaluator validity, authority freshness, effect completeness, recovery, residual accessibility, independence, or transfer remains residual or blocked.
refutation_criteria: Refute an invariant when a reachable ordinary or adversarial trace satisfies its premises and violates role separation, authority intersection, locality, policy-first filtering, lease enforcement, partition denial, complete denominators, recovery, invalidation, or scope.

Refute a mechanism benefit when matched ablation preserves or improves the joint frontier, or the apparent benefit is explained by extra resources, easier jobs, evaluator sharing, hidden repair, denial, or denominator changes.

Refute useful, safe, private, available, efficient, secure, governable, transferable, or state-of-the-art language when a simpler control wins, useful throughput collapses, a material failure remains hidden, or independent reproduction and transfer fail.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only when a more precise placement owner supersedes the atom and every live job, lease, route, approval, artifact, effect, credential, residual, recovery duty, provider obligation, and descendant migrates with preserved lineage.

reproduction.command: python3 scripts/validate_hive_admission.py && python3 scripts/validate_partitioned_authority_fixture.py && cd lean && lake build AsiStackProofs.PersonalComputeHives
reproduction.environment_lock: Repository finite fixtures and proof envelope current through 2026-07-14; live multi-node campaign not yet frozen.
reproduction.evaluator_identity: Current harness evaluators are local deterministic implementations; independent placement, authority, runtime, security, privacy, and outcome evaluators are required for promotion.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Build the bounded live multi-node reference slice, preregister the natural/adversarial matched-baseline campaign, execute causal ablations with complete joint denominators, reproduce through independent evaluator and orchestration implementations, and transfer across heterogeneous devices, networks, principals, providers, threats, lifecycle changes, and time.

non_claims: A source mapping, tool feature, CAP theorem, schema, valid fixture, theorem, record route, dashboard, imported metadata, currentness report, or zero observed mutation does not establish useful hive behavior, deployed enforcement, security, privacy, availability, efficiency, recovery, transfer, or state-of-the-art status.
The partitioned-authority result is a finite authored fixture, not a live network partition, distributed consensus, availability, revocation-propagation, runtime-enforcement, or security result.
No support, deployment, release, AGI, or ASI state changes through this semantic review.

personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edg.strongest_counterclaim: A manual local/cloud choice plus ordinary orchestration provides adequate placement at lower complexity and governance cost.
personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edg.falsifier: Matched natural and adversarial work shows no unique joint-frontier benefit, predicted ablation signatures fail, or the hive loses authority, locality, partition, recovery, denominator, or residual discipline.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: It does not prove model adequacy or a distributed scheduler, network boundary, rented-node sandbox, family-governance policy, privacy guarantee, approval service, partition tolerance, energy-aware scheduling, dropout recovery, audit replay, revocation propagation, effect-complete rollback, or live federation behavior.

preserved_disposition.rationale: Adjudicated as a bounded current-state, source, fixture, or non-claim report; it does not create an independent promoted atom.

prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The chapter proof surface was rewritten during the active refinement; this sentence is no longer current prose. Listed replacements preserve the nearest current semantic role, not textual identity.

non_claims: The semantic sweep, atom count, exact source mapping, schema, fixture, theorem, validator, and green build are governance and navigation evidence, not proof of hive efficacy.
The 2/8 admission and 3/6 partition results are finite authored record checks and do not establish scheduler behavior, network enforcement, security, privacy, availability, useful work, or transfer.
No support state, deployment status, release state, AGI claim, or ASI claim changes through this packet.
